options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: start_with_sports
options.description:
Start with the sports? HEAVILY RECOMMENDED
Will cause immediate BK if off

options.name: start_with_mushroom_cup
options.display_name: Start with Mushroom Cup (+Stages) - READ DESCRIPTION!
options.description:
Start with Mushroom Cup for Basketball, Dodgeball, Volleyball and Hockey? (Also unlocks related stages)
Heavily recommended, may break some things if off

options.name: start_with_characters
options.description: Start with 2 or 3 random characters

options.name: exhibition_difficulty
options.description:
Which exhibition difficulties should be included? If the difficulty is off, you won't be able to send checks with
that difficulty
(Easy, Normal, Hard, Expert)

options.name: hard_tournament_difficulty
options.description: Would you like to include location checks for Hard Tournaments?

options.name: party_mode
options.description:
What party mode games do you want to include?
(Feed Petey, Harmony Hustle, Bob-omb Dodge, Smash Skate)
Doesn't work at the moment

options.name: sports_mix_unlock
options.description:
Unlock Sports Mix by getting 4 Sports Crystals from other players (Or yourself!)
or get Sports Mix as an item

options.name: win_cups_amount
options.description: How many cups are required to goal? - Need to wait for 0.6.8 AP

options.name: trap_chance
options.description: The chance a filler is swapped with a trap

options.name: goal_condition
options.description: What is your goal?

options.name: be_mean
options.description:
Have locations behind bosses even if your goal isn't that boss!
Cannot be the same as the goal condition!

options.name: behemoth_hp
options.description:
Behemoth Health - 2400 is default
Recommended to edit this in the YAML (2400 - 4000)

options.name: behemoth_king_hp
options.description:
Behemoth King Health - 3000 is default
Recommended to edit this in the YAML (3000 - 7000)

options.name: deathlink
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: deathlink_action
options.description:
What counts as sending a deathlink? Requires Deathlink on

NOTE: Every number of points works like normal for everything BUT dodgeball.
In dodgeball, everytime the opponent wins the set a deathlink triggers

options.name: deathlink_consequence
options.description: What happens when you receive a deathlink? Requires Deathlink on

options.name: deathlink_opponent_scores_points
options.description:
How many points should the opponent get to send a deathlink?
Requires Deathlink on & Every number of points action

options.name: deathlink_opponent_get_points
options.description:
How many points should the opponent get when receiving a deathlink?
Requires Deathlink on & Opponent Gains Point consequence

options.name: deathlink_boss_health_recovered
options.description:
What percentage of the boss' health should be recovered when sent a deathlink?
(Behemoth & Behemoth King)

options.name: deathlink_dodgeball_health_lost
options.description:
**ONLY FOR DODGEBALL**
How much health will you lose when you get sent a deathlink if you're
in dodgeball?

options.name: character_sanity
options.description:
Turn on or off Character Sanity
(Playing with a character and/or costume sends a check)

options.name: send_both_character_sanity
options.description:
When playing with a costume, sends the Character Sanity
check for *both* the character and the costume

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
